TEXT:
A research vessel recovered a transmission from the trench floor. It began as engineering telemetry and slowly turned into philosophy. As time passed it became known by names like "Elden," its predecessor or successor ("The Stone"), which is now called The Church House." Its work was described literally with words such (the term) "to make something more than what itself can be;" that people could believe whatever they wanted without actually changing anything about themselves within their lives - including becoming enlightened if others were willing . A group named Eldens had discovered this phenomenon when he found out how much information each person needed for his own agenda on Earth's surface at various points during human history while being ignorant one day before another learned
